testcase.name: renders each statistic as a full grid item with an optional unit
shows a retry action when loading fails
delegates navigation instead of executing an unsupported report action
hides mutating actions without write permission
emits controlled actions when permission is granted
正常渲染子组件（无错误时）
捕获子组件渲染错误并显示错误 UI

testcase.name: 显示报告问题按钮

testcase.classname: Layout ErrorBoundary › 错误操作按钮
testcase.name: 点击返回首页按钮跳转到 dashboard

testcase.classname: Layout ErrorBoundary › 错误操作按钮

使用自定义 fallback 组件
调用 onError 回调函数
onError 回调接收错误和错误信息

testcase.classname: Layout ErrorBoundary › 错误详情显示
testcase.name: 显示错误消息

testcase.classname: Layout ErrorBoundary › 错误详情显示
testcase.name: 开发环境显示堆栈跟踪详情

testcase.classname: Layout ErrorBoundary › 错误详情显示
testcase.name: 生产环境不显示堆栈跟踪详情

testcase.classname: Layout ErrorBoundary › 错误报告内容
testcase.name: 错误报告包含错误信息

testcase.classname: Layout ErrorBoundary › 组件生命周期
testcase.name: 组件卸载时清理事件监听器
捕获全局错误并记录到控制台
捕获未处理的 Promise rejection
无错误时显示 Unknown error
点击刷新按钮重新加载页面
内层错误被内层 ErrorBoundary 捕获
外层 ErrorBoundary 捕获传播的错误
捕获 useEffect 中的异步错误
错误状态在重置后恢复正常渲染
子组件变化不自动重置错误状态
错误消息包含特殊字符
应该显示上游影响标签
应该显示下游影响标签
应该显示关联工单标签
应该显示关联事件标签
点击分析按钮应调用 onAnalyze
加载状态应显示加载指示器
没有影响分析数据应显示空状态
应该显示 CI影响分析 标题
应该显示变更历史标题
点击加载按钮应调用 onLoad
应该显示所有变更记录
应该显示操作方法标签
加载状态应显示加载指示器
没有变更历史应显示空状态
changeHistory 为 null 应显示空状态
应该传递正确的 ciId 和 ciName 给子组件
renders the 审批语义 panel for UserTask nodes with default taskPurpose=work
shows the approval sub-panel when taskPurpose is approval
reveals the approvalThreshold input when approvalMode is threshold
hides the approvalThreshold input for non-threshold approval modes
writes the right moddle key for every approval control
does not render the 审批语义 panel for non-UserTask nodes
renders empty-state when no selection is provided
every frontend API path matches a backend route (0 mismatches)
keeps every disabled API contract explicit and exercised by the audit
应该正确渲染 CI 名称
应该显示 CI 状态
fills the available width while preserving a usable minimum column width
does not advertise draggable behavior without a status-change handler
submits a controlled status transition after drop
blocks transitions rejected by the permission policy
keeps the controlled item in its original column when persistence fails
should call onSave when save is triggered
should call onDeploy when deploy is triggered
应该显示 CI 基本信息字段
应该处理可选字段为空值
应该显示标签和重要性
应该显示发现源和数据来源
正常渲染子组件（无错误时）
捕获子组件渲染错误并显示错误 UI
点击重试按钮重置错误状态
点击返回首页按钮跳转首页
点击报告问题按钮复制错误信息到剪贴板
使用自定义 fallback 组件
调用 onError 回调函数
showDetails 为 true 时显示错误详情
showDetails 为 false 时不显示错误详情
resetOnPropsChange 为 true 时，props 变化重置错误状态
resetOnPropsChange 为 false 时，props 变化不重置错误状态
仅 children 变化不触发重置
包装组件并添加错误边界
提供 captureError 和 resetError 函数
组件卸载时清理定时器

testcase.classname: ErrorBoundary › 错误 ID 生成
testcase.name: 生成错误 ID
捕获错误并显示错误 UI
点击重试按钮重置错误状态
点击返回首页按钮跳转到 dashboard
点击报告问题按钮复制错误信息到剪贴板
多次错误增加错误计数
owns persistence and creates a ticket exactly once
does not report success when persistence fails
should render all stat cards correctly
hides text when showText is false
shows text when showText is true
renders unknown status with the status value as label
renders empty string status with default fallback
applies correct color for draft status
applies correct color for pending status
applies correct color for approved status
applies correct color for rejected status
applies correct color for in_progress status
applies correct color for completed status
applies correct color for rolled_back status
applies correct color for cancelled status
应该正确渲染标题和数值
登录时无租户应设置 currentTenant 为 null
用户未登录时 updateUser 应不报错
用户有权限时应返回 true
用户无权限时应返回 false
用户为 null 时应返回 false
用户有角色时应返回 true
用户角色不匹配时应返回 false
应正确设置 loading 状态
应正确设置 error 状态
PERMISSIONS 应包含所有预期权限
ROLES 应包含所有预期角色
should handle HTTP error status codes
should include authorization header when token exists

testcase.classname: API Integration Tests › Performance and Caching
testcase.name: should handle concurrent requests

testcase.classname: API Integration Tests › Performance and Caching
testcase.name: should handle large response payloads
renders only the supported read-only report directory
应该支持自定义提示文本
defaults to same-origin when no public API URL is configured
returns null token when no cookie is set
setToken populates the in-memory token; clearToken clears it
sends a GET request to the full URL
serializes query params and drops undefined/null
returns camelCase data when backend sends snake_case
sends a POST with JSON body and returns response data
throws on non-zero backend code with the backend message
throws with HTTP status when response.ok is false
tolerates a missing code field (BPMN controllers do not always set one)
put uses PUT method and JSON body
delete uses DELETE method and accepts an optional body
adds CSRF token to mutating requests only
adds Bearer token from cookie when present
adds tenant headers when TenantContext is populated
does not add tenant headers when TenantContext is empty
wraps the data array under operation/data
应该渲染登录表单的所有必需元素
应该具有正确的表单结构
应该允许用户在用户名和密码字段中输入
登录失败时应该处理错误
should return null when no token exists
should return access token from cookie
should return null when no token exists
should return refresh token from cookie
should return current user from store
should return true when store has authenticated status
should return true when access token exists in cookie
should login successfully with valid credentials
should return false on login failure
should handle third party login successfully
should throw error on failed third party login
should return false on registration failure
should send password reset email successfully
should return false on forgot password failure
should return false on reset password failure
should return false for invalid token
should return false when no refresh token exists
should return false on refresh failure
should handle logout network error gracefully
getCookie should return null in non-browser environment
getCookie should return cookie value when exists
should return false for empty string
should return false for whitespace-only string
should return true for non-empty string
should return false for empty array
should return true for non-empty array
should return true for valid email
should return true for email with subdomain
should return false for email without @
should return false for email without domain
should return false for email without username
should return false for email with spaces
should return true for valid China mobile numbers
should return false for invalid phone numbers
should return true for string at minimum length
should return true for string longer than minimum
should return false for string shorter than minimum
should return true for string at maximum length
should return true for string shorter than maximum
should return false for string longer than maximum
should return true for number at minimum value
should return true for number greater than minimum
should return false for number less than minimum
should return true for number at maximum value
should return true for number less than maximum
should return false for number greater than maximum
should return true for valid URL
should return false for invalid URL
should return true for ftp URL
should return true for numeric string
should return false for non-numeric string
should return true for empty string (Number("") === 0)
should return true for integer string
should return false for decimal string
should return true for positive numbers
should return false for negative numbers
should return true for positive numbers
should return false for negative numbers
should return true for valid date string
should return false for invalid date string
should return true for value in options
should return false for value not in options
should return errors for invalid data
should support multiple rules per field
should return false when no refresh token cookie exists
should successfully refresh token when refresh cookie exists
should clear tokens when refresh fails

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › AuthService Token Management › setTokens()
testcase.name: should be a no-op (tokens stored in httpOnly cookies by backend)

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › AuthService Token Management › getAccessToken()
testcase.name: should return null (httpOnly cookies not readable from JS)

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › AuthService Token Management › getRefreshToken()
testcase.name: should return null when no cookie exists

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › AuthService Token Management › getRefreshToken()
testcase.name: should return token value when cookie exists

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › AuthService Token Management › clearTokens()
testcase.name: should call logout from auth store

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › AuthService Token Management › isAuthenticated()
testcase.name: should return true when auth store says authenticated

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › AuthService Token Management › isAuthenticated()
testcase.name: should return true when access_token cookie exists

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › AuthService Token Management › isAuthenticated()
testcase.name: should return false when no auth state or cookie
should return false when no refresh token exists

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › Token Storage Functions › getAccessToken()
testcase.name: should return null (httpOnly cookies not readable from JS)

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › Token Storage Functions › getRefreshToken()
testcase.name: should return null (httpOnly cookies not readable from JS)

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › Token Storage Functions › clearAuthStorage()
testcase.name: should clear tenant and legacy keys from localStorage

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › Token Storage Functions › isAuthenticated()
testcase.name: should return true when auth cookie exists

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › Token Storage Functions › isAuthenticated()
testcase.name: should return true when access_token cookie exists

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › Token Storage Functions › isAuthenticated()
testcase.name: should return false when no auth cookie

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › Token Storage Functions › setAccessToken / setRefreshToken
testcase.name: should be no-op (tokens set by backend via httpOnly cookies)

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › Edge Cases
testcase.name: should handle SSR environment (window undefined)

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › Edge Cases
testcase.name: should handle malformed JWT payload

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › Integration Scenarios
testcase.name: should complete full auth flow: login → token refresh → API call

testcase.classname: Auth Token Refresh Mechanism › Integration Scenarios
testcase.name: should handle session timeout after multiple failed refresh attempts
should return unchanged string without special characters
should return original string if no tags
should validate file sizes under limit
should reject file sizes over limit
should generate password of specified length
should generate different passwords each time
should return true for expired sessions
should return false for valid sessions
should return false for safe content
should omit CSRF token if not provided
should produce different obfuscations with different keys
should get and set configuration values
getTickets calls GET /api/v1/tickets with query params
createTicket calls POST /api/v1/tickets with the body
updateTicket calls PUT /api/v1/tickets/:id with the body
assign calls POST /api/v1/tickets/:id/assign with assigneeId + optional comment
assign omits comment when not provided
resolve calls POST /api/v1/tickets/:id/resolve with resolution + code
approve calls POST /api/v1/tickets/workflow/approve with ticketId + action
forward calls POST /api/v1/tickets/workflow/forward with toUserId + comment
propagates backend error message on non-zero code
should format valid ISO date string
should return empty string for undefined
should return empty string for null
should return empty string for empty string
should return Invalid Date for invalid date
should handle ISO format with milliseconds
should return mapped value when key exists
should return original value when key does not exist
should return empty string for undefined value
should return empty string for null value
should return empty string for empty string value
每个模板应该有必需字段
模板应该包含有效的描述
每个用户应该有必需字段
应该定义标题验证规则
应该定义描述验证规则
应该定义类型验证规则
应该定义分类验证规则
应该定义优先级验证规则
应该定义工单类型选项
每个选项应该有 value 和 label
应该返回步骤2的空数组
should fetch process definition using key
should fetch all versions of a process
returns the already-unwrapped definition after update
persists a new version through the backend version endpoint
should initialize with zh-CN language by default
should initialize with en-US when preference is set
should return translation for valid key
should return key when translation not found
should return key when placeholder params provided for unknown key
exposes collapsed: false on first read
returns to the same value after two toggles
sets collapsed to false after it was true
mutations are visible to subsequent getState() calls
应该传递正确的 ciId 给子组件
应该接收必需的 ciId prop
ciId 变化时应重新渲染
builds the URL from NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL and includes user_id + token
falls back to localhost:8090 when NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL is not set
does not call onNotification for 'heartbeat' messages
logs server error messages but does not throw
does not crash when a message has no data
marks the service as not connected and clears reconnect intent
does not schedule a reconnect after a manual disconnect
schedules a reconnect after an unexpected close
rejects when no credentials have been stored
reuses stored credentials when called after connect
generates BPMN XML through the backend AI endpoint
previews BPMN structure through the backend AI endpoint
loads template suggestions from the backend AI endpoint
should create client with default base URL
should create client with custom base URL
should set and get tenant ID (deprecated — delegates to TenantContext)
should set and get tenant code (deprecated — delegates to TenantContext)
should return null when no token

testcase.classname: HttpClient methods › token from cookie (via setToken)
testcase.name: should accept token via setToken
should parse permission strings into a Set
should return empty Set for empty array
should return false for non-wildcard permissions
should return false for empty Set
should return true when permission matches exactly
should return false when permission does not match
should match "*" wildcard for any permission
should match "*:*" wildcard for any permission
should return true when all permissions are present
should return false when any permission is missing
should return true for empty required array
should return true when any permission is present
should return false when no permissions are present
should return false for empty required array
persists assignment, approval and countersign attributes
calls the real BPMN AI generate endpoint and applies generated XML
renders a clean error when generation fails
renders empty state when no data
renders header with title and description
hides header when showHeader is false
shows loading spinner while fetching data
hides loading spinner after data is loaded
calls API with correct page number when pagination changes
navigates to new change page when new button is clicked
